title: cyathula orthacantha
intro: Cyathula orthacantha, also known as Chinese water-plantain or water primrose, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the family Polygonaceae. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. It is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating pain and swelling, and treating gastrointestinal issues. Cyathula orthacantha can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or dried extracts, which are commonly used to treat a range of health conditions.
